sales.title:
Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 444 — Trio of Greek and Roman Graded Silver Coins. Consists of:
1. Ionia, Chios, c. 435-350 BC. AR Drachm. NGC Choice Fine.
2. Cyrenaica, Cyrene. Drachm of Trajan. ANACS VF-25.
3. Ptolemaic Kingdom. Cleopat
sales.description:
Trio of Greek and Roman Graded Silver Coins. Consists of:
1. Ionia, Chios, c. 435-350 BC. AR Drachm. NGC Choice Fine.
2. Cyrenaica, Cyrene. Drachm of Trajan. ANACS VF-25.
3. Ptolemaic Kingdom. Cleopatra II & Ptolemy IX, Joint reign 116-107 BC. AR Tetradrachm NGC Fine. Lot of 3 coins.  Estimated Value $300 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....
